parsed_output.justification: Tyler immediately accuses Erin of being a Werewolf at the start of the discussion (Line 9) before any roles are claimed, which is a common tactic for Werewolves to divert suspicion. Furthermore, Tyler claims to be the Robber who robbed Clint and became the Insomniac, but Clint contradicts this by claiming he is still the Insomniac. The coordination between Tyler and Clint in targeting Erin suggests they are on the same team (Werewolf and Minion), and Tyler's aggressive leadership in the accusations makes him the most likely Werewolf.
